name: CMP_ASG_SALARY_COMPONENTS_V
query: select csc.salary_id, csc.salary_component_id, csa.salary_basis_id, csa.currency_code, csb.name "SALARY_BASIS_NAME", csa.assignment_id, csa.date_from, csa.date_to, hlk.display_sequence, csc.component_reason_code, hlk.meaning as component_name, csc.change_amount as component_amount, csc.change_percentage as component_percentage from cmp_salary_components csc, cmp_salary csa, hcm_lookups hlk, cmp_salary_bases csb where csc.salary_id = csa.salary_id and hlk.lookup_type ='CMP_SALARY_COMPONENTS' and csa.salary_basis_id = csb.salary_basis_id and hlk.lookup_code = csc.component_reason_code
